Deprecated API

Contents

  • Deprecated Classes
  • Deprecated Fields
  • Deprecated Methods
  • Deprecated Classes 
    Class and Description
    org.apache.paimon.flink.action.FlinkActions
    Compatible with older versions of usage
    org.apache.flink.table.hive.LegacyHiveClasses
    org.apache.flink.table.store.hive.TableStoreHiveStorageHandler
    org.apache.flink.table.store.mapred.TableStoreInputFormat
    org.apache.flink.table.store.mapred.TableStoreOutputFormat
    org.apache.flink.table.store.hive.TableStoreSerDe
  • Deprecated Fields 
    Field and Description
    org.apache.paimon.flink.FlinkConnectorOptions.CHANGELOG_PRODUCER_FULL_COMPACTION_TRIGGER_INTERVAL
    org.apache.paimon.codegen.codesplit.JavaParser.tokenNames
    Use JavaParser.VOCABULARY instead.
    org.apache.paimon.codegen.codesplit.JavaLexer.tokenNames
    Use JavaLexer.VOCABULARY instead.
    org.apache.paimon.codegen.codesplit.JavaLexer.tokenNames
    Use JavaLexer.VOCABULARY instead.
    org.apache.paimon.codegen.codesplit.JavaParser.tokenNames
    Use JavaParser.VOCABULARY instead.
  • Deprecated Methods 
    Method and Description
    org.apache.paimon.options.ConfigOptions.OptionBuilder.defaultValue(T)
    define the type explicitly first with one of the intType(), stringType(), etc.
    org.apache.paimon.options.ConfigOption.deprecatedKeys()
    Replaced by ConfigOption.fallbackKeys()
    org.apache.paimon.table.sink.StreamTableCommit.filterCommitted(Set<Long>)
    Use StreamTableCommit.filterAndCommit(java.util.Map<java.lang.Long, java.util.List<org.apache.paimon.table.sink.CommitMessage>>) to filter and commit all CommitMessage in question with one method call, instead of calling this method first and then call StreamTableCommit.commit(long, java.util.List<org.apache.paimon.table.sink.CommitMessage>).
    org.apache.paimon.io.DataOutputSerializer.getByteArray()
    Replaced by DataOutputSerializer.getSharedBuffer() for a better, safer name.
    org.apache.paimon.codegen.codesplit.JavaParser.getTokenNames()
    org.apache.paimon.codegen.codesplit.JavaLexer.getTokenNames()
    org.apache.paimon.codegen.codesplit.JavaLexer.getTokenNames()
    org.apache.paimon.codegen.codesplit.JavaParser.getTokenNames()
    org.apache.paimon.options.ConfigOption.hasDeprecatedKeys()
    Replaced by ConfigOption.hasFallbackKeys()
    org.apache.paimon.options.ConfigOptions.OptionBuilder.noDefaultValue()
    define the type explicitly first with one of the intType(), stringType(), etc.
    org.apache.paimon.data.BinaryArrayWriter.setNullAt(int, DataType)
    Use BinaryArrayWriter.createNullSetter(DataType) for avoiding logical types during runtime.
    org.apache.paimon.data.BinaryWriter.write(BinaryWriter, int, Object, DataType, Serializer<?>)
    Use #createValueSetter(DataType) for avoiding logical types during runtime.
